entries.name: default-router-rules
entries.description: Comprehensive TPT Router ruleset — routes short/simple prompts to cheaper models and code, debugging, and security contexts to capable models

entries.name: common-vault-patterns
entries.description: Extended credential patterns for Slack, SendGrid, Twilio, Google Cloud, Azure AD, and generic internal API key formats

entries.name: silent-edit-system-prompt
entries.description: System prompt template that instructs LLMs to output file edits using the TPT Silent Edit tpt-edit JSON schema
